input.prompt:
I need a CollectionView that supports single item selection and
pull-to-refresh. When the user selects an item, I want to navigate
to a detail page. When they pull to refresh, I want to reload data
from my API. Show me the XAML and explain the ViewModel bindings needed.

I need a CollectionView that supports single item selection and
pull-to-refresh. When the user selects an item, I want to navigate

input.initialPrompt:
I need a CollectionView that supports single item selection and
pull-to-refresh. When the user selects an item, I want to navigate
to a detail page. When they pull to refresh, I want to reload data
from my API. Show me the XAML and explain the ViewModel bindings needed.

data.content:
Here's a complete example:

**XAML:**
```xml
<ContentPage xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/dotnet/2021/maui"
             xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2009/xaml"
             x:Class="MyApp.Views.ItemsPage">

    <CollectionView ItemsSource="{Binding Items}"
                    SelectionMode="Single"
                    SelectedItem="{Binding SelectedItem}"
                    IsRefreshing="{Binding IsRefreshing}"
                    RemainingItemsThreshold="0">

        <!-- Pull-to-refresh via RefreshView wrapper -->
        <CollectionView.Behaviors>
            <!-- or wrap in RefreshView instead -->
        </CollectionView.Behaviors>

    </CollectionView>
</ContentPage>
```

The cleaner approach — wrap with `RefreshView`:

```xml
<RefreshView Command="{Binding RefreshCommand}"
             IsRefreshing="{Binding IsRefreshing}">

    <CollectionView ItemsSource="{Binding Items}"
                    SelectionMode="Single"
                    SelectedItem="{Binding SelectedItem, Mode=TwoWay}"
                    SelectionChangedCommand="{Binding SelectionChangedCommand}"
                    SelectionChangedCommandParameter="{Binding SelectedItem}">

        <CollectionView.ItemTemplate>
            <DataTemplate>
                <VerticalStackLayout Padding="10">
                    <Label Text="{Binding Name}" FontSize="18" />
                    <Label Text="{Binding Description}" FontSize="14"
                           TextColor="Gray" />
                </VerticalStackLayout>
            </DataTemplate>
        </CollectionView.ItemTemplate>

    </CollectionView>
</RefreshView>
```

**ViewModel (using CommunityToolkit.Mvvm):**
```csharp
public partial class ItemsViewModel : ObservableObject
{
    private readonly IApiService _api;
    private readonly INavigationService _nav;

    [ObservableProperty]
    private ObservableCollection<Item> _items = new();

    [ObservableProperty]
    private Item? _selectedItem;

    [ObservableProperty]
    private bool _isRefreshing;

    public ItemsViewModel(IApiService api, INavigationService nav)
    {
        _api = api;
        _nav = nav;
    }

    [RelayCommand]
    private async Task Refresh()
    {
        try
        {
            var data = await _api.GetItemsAsync();
            Items = new ObservableCollection<Item>(data);
        }
        finally
        {
            IsRefreshing = false; // stops the spinner
        }
    }

    [RelayCommand]
    private async Task SelectionChanged()
    {
        if (SelectedItem is null) return;

        await _nav.NavigateToAsync(nameof(DetailPage),
            new Dictionary<string, object> { { "Item", SelectedItem } });

        SelectedItem = null; // reset so the same item can be re-selected
    }
}
```

**Key bindings explained:**

| Binding | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `ItemsSource="{Binding Items}"` | Drives the list from an `ObservableCollection` |
| `SelectedItem="{Binding SelectedItem, Mode=TwoWay}"` | Syncs selection state to the VM |
| `SelectionChangedCommand` | Fires your navigation logic on tap |
| `RefreshView.Command` | Triggers data reload on pull-down |
| `IsRefreshing` | Controls the refresh spinner; set `false` when done |

**Important details:**
- Set `SelectedItem = null` after navigation so the user can re-select the same item later.
- Always set `IsRefreshing = false` in a `finally` block to avoid a stuck spinner.
- `SelectionMode="Single"` ensures only one item highlights at a time.
- If using Shell navigation, replace `INavigationService` with `Shell.Current.GoToAsync(...)`.
data.reasoningText: The user is asking for a .NET MAUI CollectionView implementation with single selection and pull-to-refresh, along with XAML and ViewModel explanation. This is a general coding/knowledge question — no repo exploration needed.
